'''鈭歬-dh-l''' ('''kadhala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:halse|halse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-dh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:halse|halse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-dh-l
|-
! Lemma
| kadhala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kadhalithi|kadhalithi]] || [[word:kadhaliji|kadhaliji]] || [[word:kadhalishi|kadhalishi]] || [[word:kadhali|kadhali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kadhaluthuth|kadhaluthuth]] || [[word:kadhalujuj|kadhalujuj]] || [[word:kadhalushush|kadhalushush]] || [[word:kadhal|kadhal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kadhaluthu|kadhaluthu]] || [[word:kadhaluju|kadhaluju]] || [[word:kadhalushu|kadhalushu]] || [[word:kadhalu|kadhalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kadhalufuth|kadhalufuth]] || [[word:kadhalufuj|kadhalufuj]] || [[word:kadhalufush|kadhalufush]] || [[word:kadhaluf|kadhaluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kadhalethe|kadhalethe]] || [[word:kadhaleje|kadhaleje]] || [[word:kadhaleshe|kadhaleshe]] || [[word:kadhale|kadhale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kadhalothoth|kadhalothoth]] || [[word:kadhalojoj|kadhalojoj]] || [[word:kadhaloshosh|kadhaloshosh]] || [[word:kadhal|kadhal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kadhalotho|kadhalotho]] || [[word:kadhalojo|kadhalojo]] || [[word:kadhalosho|kadhalosho]] || [[word:kadhalo|kadhalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kadhalofoth|kadhalofoth]] || [[word:kadhalofoj|kadhalofoj]] || [[word:kadhalofosh|kadhalofosh]] || [[word:kadhalof|kadhalof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kadhal忙th忙|kadhal忙th忙]] || [[word:kadhal忙j忙|kadhal忙j忙]] || [[word:kadhal忙sh忙|kadhal忙sh忙]] || [[word:kadhal忙|kadhal忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kadhalathath|kadhalathath]] || [[word:kadhalajaj|kadhalajaj]] || [[word:kadhalashash|kadhalashash]] || [[word:kadhal|kadhal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kadhalatha|kadhalatha]] || [[word:kadhalaja|kadhalaja]] || [[word:kadhalasha|kadhalasha]] || [[word:kadhala|kadhala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kadhalafath|kadhalafath]] || [[word:kadhalafaj|kadhalafaj]] || [[word:kadhalafash|kadhalafash]] || [[word:kadhalaf|kadhalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:kadhalasha|kadhalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gokadhalasha|gokadhalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokikadhalasha|gokikadhalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:kadhaln眉sha|kadhaln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokadhalnkn眉sha|gokadhalnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokikadhaln眉sha|gokikadhaln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kadhalsh毛sha|kadhalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokadhalnksh毛sha|gokadhalnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikadhalsh毛sha|gokikadhalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kadhalrosha|kadhalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokadhalnkrosha|gokadhalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikadhalrosha|gokikadhalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kadhalmusha|kadhalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokadhalnkmusha|gokadhalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikadhalmusha|gokikadhalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:kadhalsherasha|kadhalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokadhalnksherasha|gokadhalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokikadhalsherasha|gokikadhalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:kadhalngasha|kadhalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokadhalnkngasha|gokadhalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokikadhalngasha|gokikadhalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kadhalyasha|kadhalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokadhalnkyasha|gokadhalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokikadhalyasha|gokikadhalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:kadhalyamasha|kadhalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokadhalnkyamasha|gokadhalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokikadhalyamasha|gokikadhalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:kadhaln眉sh毛sha|kadhaln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokadhalnkn眉sh毛sha|gokadhalnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikadhaln眉sh毛sha|gokikadhaln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kadhaln眉rosha|kadhaln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokadhalnkn眉rosha|gokadhalnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikadhaln眉rosha|gokikadhaln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kadhaln眉musha|kadhaln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokadhalnkn眉musha|gokadhalnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikadhaln眉musha|gokikadhaln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:kadhalsh毛n眉sha|kadhalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokadhalnksh毛n眉sha|gokadhalnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikadhalsh毛n眉sha|gokikadhalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kadhalsh毛rosha|kadhalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokadhalnksh毛rosha|gokadhalnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikadhalsh毛rosha|gokikadhalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kadhalsh毛musha|kadhalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokadhalnksh毛musha|gokadhalnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikadhalsh毛musha|gokikadhalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:kadhalron眉sha|kadhalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokadhalnkron眉sha|gokadhalnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikadhalron眉sha|gokikadhalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:kadhalrosh毛sha|kadhalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokadhalnkrosh毛sha|gokadhalnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikadhalrosh毛sha|gokikadhalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kadhalromusha|kadhalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokadhalnkromusha|gokadhalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikadhalromusha|gokikadhalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:kadhalmun眉sha|kadhalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokadhalnkmun眉sha|gokadhalnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikadhalmun眉sha|gokikadhalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:kadhalmush毛sha|kadhalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokadhalnkmush毛sha|gokadhalnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikadhalmush毛sha|gokikadhalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kadhalmurosha|kadhalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokadhalnkmurosha|gokadhalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikadhalmurosha|gokikadhalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:kadhal|kadhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:k忙dh忙l|k忙dh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hokadhal|hokadhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hok忙dh忙l|hok忙dh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokadhal|hohokadhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohok忙dh忙l|hohok忙dh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉kadhal|n眉kadhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉k忙dh忙l|n眉k忙dh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉kadhal|n眉n眉kadhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉k忙dh忙l|n眉n眉k忙dh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂kadhal|n茂kadhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂k忙dh忙l|n茂k忙dh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂kadhal|n茂n茂kadhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂k忙dh忙l|n茂n茂k忙dh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lukadhal|lukadhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luk忙dh忙l|luk忙dh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukadhal|lulukadhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluk忙dh忙l|luluk忙dh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:likadhal|likadhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lik忙dh忙l|lik忙dh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikadhal|lilikadhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilik忙dh忙l|lilik忙dh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kokadhal|kokadhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kok忙dh忙l|kok忙dh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokadhal|kokokadhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokok忙dh忙l|kokok忙dh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kekadhal|kekadhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kek忙dh忙l|kek忙dh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekadhal|kekekadhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekek忙dh忙l|kekek忙dh忙l]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
